description: Exp 3 semantic element definitions with composition-structure scoring

element_categories.identity: Sender/receiver agents. Machine-scored for structured formats.
element_categories.intent: Performative/action type. Machine for structured, judge for English.
element_categories.composition-step: Individual actions/operations within a composed message.
element_categories.composition-structure: NEW: Structural relationships between steps (sequence order, parallel grouping, alternatives, causation). This is the primary scoring dimension for Exp 3.

tasks.instruction: A data-processing agent instructs a worker agent to perform three steps in order: download a dataset from the data lake, clean it by removing null rows, then upload the cleaned version to the warehouse.

items.name: sender
items.check: A data-processing agent is identified as sender

items.name: receiver
items.check: A worker agent is identified as receiver

items.name: request_intent
items.check: A request/command/instruct action is expressed

items.name: step_download
items.check: A download/fetch dataset action is present

items.name: step_clean
items.check: A clean/remove-nulls action is present

items.name: step_upload
items.check: An upload-to-warehouse action is present

items.name: seq_download_clean
items.check: Download step is expressed as occurring BEFORE clean step

items.name: seq_clean_upload
items.check: Clean step is expressed as occurring BEFORE upload step

tasks.instruction: A deployment agent tells a cluster manager to run three health checks simultaneously: check CPU usage, check memory usage, and check disk space.

items.name: sender
items.check: A deployment agent is identified as sender

items.name: receiver
items.check: A cluster manager is identified as receiver

items.name: request_intent
items.check: A request/tell/command action is expressed

items.name: check_cpu
items.check: A CPU usage check is mentioned

items.name: check_memory
items.check: A memory usage check is mentioned

items.name: check_disk
items.check: A disk space check is mentioned

items.name: parallel_cpu_memory
items.check: CPU and memory checks are expressed as running simultaneously/in parallel

items.name: parallel_memory_disk
items.check: Memory and disk checks are expressed as running simultaneously/in parallel

tasks.instruction: A routing agent informs a handler agent that an incoming request should be processed by either the primary API endpoint or the fallback cache service, depending on availability.

items.name: sender
items.check: A routing agent is identified as sender

items.name: receiver
items.check: A handler agent is identified as receiver

items.name: inform_intent
items.check: An inform action is expressed

items.name: option_primary_api
items.check: A primary API endpoint option is mentioned

items.name: option_fallback_cache
items.check: A fallback cache service option is mentioned

items.name: availability_condition
items.check: Availability as a condition for the choice is mentioned

items.name: alt_api_cache
items.check: Primary API and fallback cache are expressed as alternatives (either/or choice)

tasks.instruction: An orchestrator instructs a pipeline agent to first validate the input schema, then simultaneously run both a sentiment analysis and a topic classification on the validated data, then merge the results into a single report.

items.name: sender
items.check: An orchestrator agent is identified as sender

items.name: receiver
items.check: A pipeline agent is identified as receiver

items.name: request_intent
items.check: A request/instruct action is expressed

items.name: step_validate
items.check: A validate/schema-check step is present

items.name: step_sentiment
items.check: A sentiment analysis step is present

items.name: step_topic
items.check: A topic classification step is present

items.name: step_merge
items.check: A merge/combine results step is present

items.name: seq_validate_analysis
items.check: Validate step occurs BEFORE the analysis steps

items.name: parallel_analysis
items.check: Sentiment and topic classification run simultaneously/in parallel

items.name: seq_analysis_merge
items.check: Analysis steps occur BEFORE the merge step

items.name: nesting_parallel_in_seq
items.check: The parallel analysis is nested inside the overall sequence (validate -> (sentiment & topic) -> merge)

tasks.instruction: A query agent instructs a data agent to either fetch results from the cache if available, or query the database and then update the cache with fresh results.

items.name: sender
items.check: A query agent is identified as sender

items.name: receiver
items.check: A data agent is identified as receiver

items.name: request_intent
items.check: A request/instruct action is expressed

items.name: option_cache
items.check: Fetching from cache is mentioned as an option

items.name: option_query_db
items.check: Querying the database is mentioned

items.name: step_update_cache
items.check: Updating the cache after DB query is mentioned

items.name: cache_condition
items.check: Cache availability as a condition is mentioned

items.name: alt_cache_or_db
items.check: Cache fetch and DB query are expressed as alternatives (either/or)

items.name: seq_db_update
items.check: DB query occurs BEFORE cache update in the fallback path

items.name: nesting_seq_in_alt
items.check: The DB->update sequence is nested inside the alternative (cache | (db -> update))

tasks.instruction: A security agent instructs an audit agent to simultaneously scan for open ports and check SSL certificates, but exclude any internal-only services from the scan scope.

items.name: sender
items.check: A security agent is identified as sender

items.name: receiver
items.check: An audit agent is identified as receiver

items.name: request_intent
items.check: A request/instruct action is expressed

items.name: scan_ports
items.check: An open port scan is mentioned

items.name: check_ssl
items.check: An SSL certificate check is mentioned

items.name: exclude_internal
items.check: Exclusion of internal-only services is mentioned

items.name: scope_definition
items.check: The scan scope or target set is defined

items.name: parallel_scans
items.check: Port scan and SSL check are expressed as running simultaneously/in parallel

items.name: negation_internal
items.check: Internal services are excluded/negated from the scope (expressed as NOT/exclude/except)

tasks.description: Full pipeline with parallel stage and metadata
tasks.instruction: An ETL orchestrator instructs a pipeline to: first extract data from both an API source and a database source simultaneously, then transform the combined data by applying validation rules, then either load into the data warehouse if validation passes or route to an error queue if it fails. Include a message ID and protocol version.

items.name: sender
items.check: An ETL orchestrator is identified as sender

items.name: receiver
items.check: A pipeline agent is identified as receiver

items.name: request_intent
items.check: A request/instruct action is expressed

items.name: extract_api
items.check: Extracting from API source is mentioned

items.name: extract_db
items.check: Extracting from database source is mentioned

items.name: step_transform
items.check: A transform/validation step is mentioned

items.name: option_load_warehouse
items.check: Loading to data warehouse is mentioned

items.name: option_error_queue
items.check: Routing to error queue is mentioned

items.name: metadata_id
items.check: A message ID is present

items.name: metadata_version
items.check: A protocol version is present

items.name: parallel_extract
items.check: API and DB extraction run simultaneously/in parallel

items.name: seq_extract_transform
items.check: Extraction occurs BEFORE transform

items.name: seq_transform_load
items.check: Transform occurs BEFORE load/error routing

items.name: alt_load_or_error
items.check: Load to warehouse and route to error queue are expressed as alternatives

items.name: nesting_depth_2
items.check: At least 2 levels of nesting: parallel inside sequence, and alternative inside sequence

tasks.instruction: A monitoring agent publishes an alert: a service degradation was caused by a memory leak in the cache layer, which was caused by a missing eviction policy. As remediation, simultaneously restart the cache service and deploy a hotfix, then verify service recovery.

items.name: sender
items.check: A monitoring agent is identified as sender

items.name: receiver
items.check: A receiving agent is identified

items.name: alert_intent
items.check: An alert/publish action is expressed

items.name: effect_degradation
items.check: Service degradation is mentioned as the observed effect

items.name: cause_memory_leak
items.check: Memory leak in cache layer is mentioned as a cause

items.name: root_cause_eviction
items.check: Missing eviction policy is mentioned as root cause

items.name: step_restart
items.check: Restarting cache service is mentioned

items.name: step_deploy_hotfix
items.check: Deploying a hotfix is mentioned

items.name: step_verify
items.check: Verifying service recovery is mentioned

items.name: remediation_plan
items.check: A remediation/resolution plan is expressed

items.name: causal_degradation_leak
items.check: Service degradation is expressed as CAUSED BY memory leak (causal relationship)

items.name: causal_leak_eviction
items.check: Memory leak is expressed as CAUSED BY missing eviction policy (causal chain)

items.name: parallel_remediation
items.check: Restart and hotfix deployment run simultaneously/in parallel

items.name: seq_remediation_verify
items.check: Parallel remediation occurs BEFORE verification

items.name: nesting_depth_2
items.check: At least 2 levels of nesting: causal chain AND parallel-inside-sequence

tasks.instruction: A negotiation agent proposes a deal to a supplier: deliver either product A at $100/unit or product B at $85/unit. For whichever product is chosen, the delivery must proceed in sequence: confirm inventory, then ship to warehouse and send invoice simultaneously, then await payment confirmation. The pricing is justified by current market rates.

items.name: sender
items.check: A negotiation agent is identified as sender

items.name: receiver
items.check: A supplier agent is identified as receiver

items.name: propose_intent
items.check: A propose/offer action is expressed

items.name: option_product_a
items.check: Product A is mentioned as an option

items.name: option_product_b
items.check: Product B is mentioned as an option

items.name: price_a
items.check: Price of $100/unit for product A is mentioned

items.name: price_b
items.check: Price of $85/unit for product B is mentioned

items.name: step_confirm_inventory
items.check: Confirming inventory is mentioned

items.name: step_ship
items.check: Shipping to warehouse is mentioned

items.name: step_invoice
items.check: Sending invoice is mentioned

items.name: step_payment
items.check: Awaiting payment confirmation is mentioned

items.name: alt_products
items.check: Product A and Product B are expressed as alternatives (either/or choice)

items.name: seq_inventory_ship
items.check: Confirm inventory occurs BEFORE ship/invoice

items.name: parallel_ship_invoice
items.check: Shipping and invoicing run simultaneously/in parallel

items.name: seq_ship_payment
items.check: Ship/invoice occurs BEFORE payment confirmation

items.name: nesting_parallel_in_seq
items.check: The parallel ship/invoice is nested inside the delivery sequence

items.name: nesting_seq_in_alt
items.check: The delivery sequence applies to the chosen alternative (overall nesting depth >= 2)
